title: Google Cloud Binary Authorization Policy
description: Schema for a Binary Authorization policy, which defines the rules for deploying container images to Google Cloud environments.

name.description: The resource name of the policy

globalPolicyEvaluationMode.description: Whether to enable the global policy evaluation mode

admissionWhitelistPatterns.description: Image name patterns that are always allowed to be deployed

defaultAdmissionRule.description: The default admission rule for the policy

clusterAdmissionRules.description: Per-cluster admission rules keyed by cluster resource ID

updateTime.description: The time when the policy was last updated

AdmissionRule.description: An admission rule specifies what action to take when a container image matches the rule

evaluationMode.description: How this admission rule will be evaluated

requireAttestationsBy.description: Resource names of attestors required by this rule

enforcementMode.description: The action when a pod creation is denied by the admission rule

AdmissionWhitelistPattern.description: An image name pattern to allow

namePattern.description: An image name pattern to allowlist, in the form registry/path/to/image
